name: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W213/S213, C238/A238 (2.0L 4-cyl turbo petrol)

serviceNotes.engine oil: M264 four-cylinder turbo: 15,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (W213/W212 2.0 petrol Tier 2 proxy). Rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (was 60,000 km / 48 months).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month renewal per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect each service; ~30,000 km planning reminder.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 omits months; set null).
serviceNotes.coolant: Updated to 30,000 km / 24 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (was 150,000 km).
serviceNotes.automatic transmission fluid: 9G-TRONIC preventive ATF ~60,000 km despite lifetime claims.
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct injection: intake cleaning ~120,000 km if carbon symptoms. E 350 from 2020 onward is commonly 2.0L M264; earlier E 350 V6 is Mercedes-E-W213-Petrol-M276.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Mercedes E 200 2013 Automatic W212; Tier 2 proxy for M264 W213 four-cylinder turbo petrol)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W213; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W213
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W213 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.spark plugs: 60,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (spark plug months not stated on Tier 2 page)
serviceSources.coolant: Changed from 150,000 km to 30,000 km / 24 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (30,000 km or 2 years, whichever first)
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection M264 — intake valve carbon cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
